## Summary

Describe the change, why it’s needed, and link to the driving Issue(s).

## Verification

- [ ] Steps to verify (commands/scripts)
- [ ] CI passes (tests/linters/build)

## Fix Type

- [ ] temp-fix (includes TTL)
- [ ] perm-fix (requires CODEOWNERS review)

TTL (if temp-fix): `temp-fix-ttl: 7d`

## Runbook Updates

- [ ] Updated `ops/jobs/<job>/README.md` with Incident, Remediation, Verification, Next
